response.justification: Substantially exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 14+ years of full-stack experience and current Staff-level role. Strong direct match on TypeScript, Node.js, and full-stack expertise, with active AI agent infrastructure work at current role. Specific framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary languages (Kotlin, Python) are present but learnable given demonstrated mastery of multiple tech stacks and clear architectural depth.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement significantly (14+ years at multiple Senior/Staff roles)
Direct TypeScript and Node.js expertise with proven full-stack architecture and scalability work
Active AI agent infrastructure and MCP development at current role—a hard-to-find requirement
concerns: Primary stack gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js foundation
Secondary language gaps: Kotlin and Python absent; cloud platforms limited to AWS (no GCP/Azure mentioned)
Frontend framework experience may be dated (Ember.js prominent; React mentioned but not recently)
